package perflayers

import (
    "fmt"
    "log"
)

func ProcessBatchPositive(items []int) []string {
    messages := make([]string, 0, len(items))
    for _, item := range items {
        message := fmt.Sprintf("log item %d", item)
        log.Printf("%s", message)
        messages = append(messages, message)
    }
    return messages
}
